name: TestWaitForDiagChannelClosed
title: TestWaitForDiagChannelClosed
syntax: long TestWaitForDiagChannelClosed(char ecuQualifier[], dword timeout_ms); // form 2
description: Waits for the occurrence of the state change of a diagnostic channel to the state Closed. Should the closing not occur before the expiration of the time timeout_ms, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: timeout_ms
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms]

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU or target as set in the diagnostic configuration dialog for the respective diagnostic description.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
